name: Three-Pepper Beef Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sirloin steak, boneless, cut into 1-inch thick pieces
1 medium Bell pepper, green, red or yellow, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 25 minutes
2. Cut the steak into 1-inch thick pieces.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together oil, lemon juice, water, mustard, honey, dried oregano, and pepper.
4. Add the beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms to the bowl, stirring to coat evenly.
5. Thread alternating pieces of beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms onto each of 4 skewers that are 12 inches long.
6. Place the skewers on a rack in the broiler pan so the surface of the meat is 3 to 4 inches from the heat.
7. Broil for 9 to 12 minutes, turning occasionally, until desired doneness is reached (rare to medium).
8. Season with salt if desired.
Note: Beef kabobs may also be grilled by placing them on a grid over medium coals and grilling for 8 to 11 minutes.
